description: Mintlify is a platform for building, hosting, and managing documentation websites, with AI-assisted search, editing, analytics, and deployment features. It also provides hosted MCP capabilities so AI tools can search documentation or, for trusted users, edit and manage Mintlify content.
summary: Mintlify exposes a REST API at api.mintlify.com, an OAuth-protected admin MCP at https://mintlify.com/mcp, and the `mint` npm CLI; REST uses admin or assistant API keys depending on endpoint, while MCP and CLI use interactive Mintlify-account OAuth.
